chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1436 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 16-10-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. On 09-10-2025, the following order was passed;- On 23-09-2025, Counsel for the Petitioners sought time for compliance; same has not yet been complied with. Even today neither Petitioners nor their Counsel is in attendance. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, on week more time is granted for compliance. Matter is adjourned to 16-10-2025. The instant Petition is pending on the file of this Court without useful progress as the Counsel has failed to comply with the office objections. The deliberate absence as well as non-compliance of the office objections, prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. No useful purpose would be served, if this petition is kept pending on the file of this Court for an indefinite period. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
